allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name'], '-', r['name'], '|', len\(r.get\('assets', []\)\), 'assets'\) for r in d]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('generatedAt:', d.get\('generatedAt'\)\); [print\(' -', a['id'], 'iOS:', [v['version'] for v in a['ios']], 'AND:', [v['version'] for v in a['android']]\) for a in d['apps']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name'], '-', r['name'], '|', len\(r.get\('assets', []\)\), 'assets:', [a['name'] for a in r.get\('assets', []\)]\) for r in d]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], '|', r['event'], '|', r['status'], '|', r['conclusion'], '|', r.get\('head_commit', {}\).get\('message', ''\)[:50], '|', r['created_at']\) for r in d.get\('workflow_runs', []\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('GitHub releases:', len\(d\)\); [print\(' -', r['tag_name'], '|', r['name'], '|', [a['name'] for a in r.get\('assets', []\)]\) for r in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['conclusion'], '|', r['display_title'], '|', r['created_at'], '|', r['html_url']\) for r in d.get\('workflow_runs', []\)]")
